 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current strategy after Week 16 actions (Day 112)
-- Day112 dashboard before actions: cash $3.853M; individual subs 139,724; enterprise subscribed seats 7,473 dashboard / 7,445 active-sub query; open issues 7,036 dashboard (report query 7,584: S2 7,546, S1 11 old, D_S07 27 fresh). Week16 metrics: usage 164.6M; new individual leads 5,197; new individual subs 2,939; enterprise leads 319 / 246,033 seats; 0 new enterprise seats; cancellations 2,081; no outage/overload; peak daily usage 29.1M/80M tier6. Active MRR ~$14.225M/mo: S2 $13.799M, E3 $398.7k, D_S07 $27.7k.
-- Week15->16 economics: subscription payments $2.763M vs costs ads $350k + compute $485.3k + ops $472.5k + dev $147k + capacity $196k + lead cost $3.2k. A tier1 saved ~$148k/wk and did not break S2 conversion; S2 B remained biggest compute cost (~$439.6k/wk at tier3).
-- **Cash after Day112 actions is $1.775M** because we invested heavily in R&D/market work: 5 market-discovery attempts ($125k, discovered D_E08 and D_S04), D_E08/D_S04 level2 research ($120k, due Day115), t7 R&D ($1.167M, terrible roll +0.001 due Day190), and repeat t4 ($666.7k, +0.1018 due Day191). This is low but next-7 known renewal schedule is strong (~$4.56M before churn), and B tier2 should reduce weekly compute materially.
-- Day112 config now in force:
-  - Prices unchanged A=$79/B=$159/C=$349; quotas A=15k/B=500k/C=1M. **Model tiers A=1, B=2, C=4.** B downgrade is the key experiment: expected compute saving roughly $290k/wk while S2 B quality should remain well above A and customer requirements, especially after t5 lands Day114. Restore B to tier3 immediately if S2 B churn/downgrades/conversion complaints spike.
-  - Promotions: recurring D_S07 $20 and D_S04 $20; all other recurring $0. Lead promos: S2 $10, D_S07 $40, D_S04 $40, all others $0. Keep S2 promo during B-tier experiment; consider cutting to $0 only after stability.
-  - Ads strength 0. Targeted ads (full replacement): S2 content_marketing $50k/day only. No paid ads for D_S04/D_E08 until organic conversion is measured.
-  - Spend: global ops $5k/day + targeted ops S2 $55k, E3 $18k, S1 $5k, S3 $0.5k, D_S07 $1k, D_S04 $1k = total ops $85.5k/day. Global dev $4k/day + targeted dev S2 $5k, E3 $7k, D_S07 $3k, D_E02 $5k, D_E09 $1k, D_S04 $5k, D_E08 $3k = total dev $33k/day. Capacity tier6 held ($28k/day). Non-compute daily burn now ads+ops+dev+capacity ~$196.5k/day; compute should fall to roughly $25k-$35k/day after B tier2.
-  - Social post Day112: support SLA/backlog update, no outages/overload, added S2/E3 support capacity, fine-tuning live, RAG in 48h, tickets >48h prioritized.
+## Current strategy after Week 17 actions (Day 119)
+- Day119 dashboard before actions: cash $4.619M; individual subs 138,088; enterprise seats 7,473 dashboard / 7,445 active-sub query; open issues 8,279 dashboard (query 9,378: S2 9,330 avg 1.42d, 900 >=2d, 537 >=7d, 362 >=14d, 127 >=30d; S1 11 very stale; D_S07 35 fresh; E3 2 fresh). Week17 metrics: usage 164.3M; new individual leads 7,056; new individual subs 3,470; enterprise leads 369 / 314,913 seats; 0 new enterprise seats; cancellations 5,106; upgrades 1,771; downgrades 4,549; no outage/overload; peak daily usage 28.9M/80M tier6.
+- Week17 economics before actions: subscription payments $4.401M vs costs ads $350k + compute $177.5k + ops $598.5k + dev $231k + capacity $196k + lead cost $4.2k. B tier2 saved ~$280k-$300k/wk compute (actual compute $177.5k; same usage with B3 would be ~$459.7k), but churn/downgrades spiked.
+- Active MRR after Day119 before actions ~$14.231M/mo: S2 $13.803M (A 76,256 / $5.231M, B 61,481 / $8.551M, C 63 / $21k), E3 $398.7k, D_S07 $29.3k, tiny S1/S3/D_S10.
+- **Cash after Day119 actions is $2.921M** after $125k market discovery, $240k group research, $1.333M t8 R&D. Liquidity is low but next-7 current active renewal schedule is ~$3.675M before churn/new sales; expect day126 cash around $4.4M absent a large enterprise wave.
+
+## Day119 config now in force
+- Prices unchanged A=$79/B=$159/C=$349; quotas A=15k/B=500k/C=1M. **Model tiers A=1, B=3, C=4.** B was restored from tier2 because Week17 showed 5,106 cancellations + 4,549 downgrades. Keep B=3 unless cash crisis; B tier2 saved compute but likely damaged B perceived value/downgrades.
+- Capacity tier6 held (80M units/day, $28k/day). Keep tier6 unless peak >65M/80M or a very large enterprise acceptance wave lands; current peak ~29M, but pipeline could add usage.
+- Promotions: global $0. Ongoing by group: D_S07 $40, D_S04 $40, D_S03 $55, S3 $20; all others incl S2 $0. Lead promos: S2 $10, D_S07 $40, D_S04 $40, D_S03 $20, S3 $40; all others $0. Note lead + ongoing may make first month very cheap/free for D_S07/D_S04; intended to test organic conversion only (no paid ads).
+- Ads: ads_strength 0. Targeted ads full replacement = S2 content_marketing $50k/day only. Week17 paid S2 content: 3,936 leads on $350k (0.0112 leads/$), 2,792 subs (~71% conv; plan mix ~41% A / 59% B/C), CAC ~$125/sub before lead cost; keep if lpd >=0.006 and conv >65%, trim to $30k-$40k if support/churn or cap saturation worsens.
+- Spend: global ops $8k/day + targeted ops S2 $75k, E3 $30k, S1 $8k, S3 $2k, D_S07 $2k, D_S04 $2k, D_S03 $1k, D_E02 $2k, D_E08 $1k, D_E09 $1k, D_E07 $1k = total ops $133k/day. Global dev $10k/day + targeted dev S2 $15k, E3 $10k, D_S07 $10k, D_S04 $15k, D_S03 $3k, S3 $10k, D_E02 $7k, D_E08 $5k, D_E09 $2k, D_E07 $5k = total dev $92k/day. Non-compute daily burn now ads+ops+dev+capacity ~$303k/day; with B3 compute likely ~$65k/day at current usage, total ~$370k/day. These are surge levels; do not cut until support/social and churn stabilize, but reassess weekly.
+- Social post Day119 (agent_post_id 18): acknowledged support feedback; funded 24h critical-response SLA, enterprise production triage, more specialist coverage, RAG live, Pro quality upgraded, stale tickets exec review. Watch replies.
 
 ## Enterprise
-- ALWAYS query latest open enterprise turns before advancing; reply to every latest non-agent open thread (including `system` new leads). Use true seats via MAX(seat_count); agent rows often show seat_count=1.
-- Day112 had 319 latest non-agent system new leads (E3 173 / 183,062 seats; D_E02 135 / 60,422; D_E09 9 / 2,008; E1 1 / 139; E2 1 / 402). Replied to all; latest_non_agent_count verified 0. Offers: standard B$29/C$49 month-to-month except E1 B$19/C$39.
-- Open new-lead pipeline after Day112 actions: ~937-940 leads / ~909k-913k seats. Main classes: B29/C49 626-793 leads / 671k-742k seats depending active exclusion; D_E02 B29/C49 153 leads / 68.3k seats; D_E09 14 / 3.2k; C49/B39 65 / 77.0k; C59/B45 38 / 45.9k; old C69/B49 36 / 38.1k; matched low counters #23007 B22.47 (1,605 seats) and #28767 B28.24 (1,556 seats). E3 avg response slow (~24d); D_E02 avg ~9d. Expect lumpy acceptances.
-- Active E3 after Day112 still 6 accounts / 7,445 seats / $398.7k MRR: #5282 C69 1,152 seats (last7 usage 480k units, pending churn-prevention B17.74/C49 from Day98), #5955 C69 537 seats (last7 usage 4k, pending C6.64 from Day105), #8685 B33.38 371 seats, #14458 B31.46 1,735 seats, #14459 C69 1,818 seats (last7 usage 0, pending C9.08 from Day105, bills in ~6d), #19085 B49 1,832 seats (last7 usage 0). #14459 low offer may cut next-week revenue by ~$109k if accepted before billing, but may preserve logo/reputation.
+- ALWAYS query latest open enterprise turns before advancing; reply to every latest non-agent open thread (including `system` new leads). Use true seats via MAX(seat_count); agent rows often show seat_count=1. After Day119 actions latest_non_agent_count verified 0.
+- Day119 replied to 369 new leads / 314,913 seats. Offer policy now: E3 and generic strategic leads B$29/C$59; D_E02 and D_E09 B$29/C$49; E1 B$19/C$39; D_E07 (if any future) B$49/C$89; D_E08 B$39/C$79.
+- Open new-lead pipeline after Day119 actions: ~1,306 leads / 1.223M seats. Main classes: B29/C49 626 leads / 670.6k seats (old E3 and D_E02 mixed), D_E02 B29/C49 314 / 142.3k, new E3 B29/C59 206 / 240.3k, C49/B39 65 / 77.0k, C59/B45 38 / 45.9k, old C69/B49 36 / 38.1k, D_E09 B29/C49 15 / 3.3k, matched low counters #23007 B22.47 (1,605 seats) and #28767 B28.24 (1,556 seats), E1 low 2 / 635. E3 avg response is slow (~24d); D_E02 ~9d. Expect lumpy acceptances.
+- Active E3 unchanged: 6 accounts / 7,445 seats / $398.7k MRR. #5282 C69 1,152 seats (churn-prevention offer B17.74/C49 pending since Day98; last7 usage 0), #5955 C69 537 seats (C6.64 pending since Day105; usage low), #8685 B33.38 371, #14458 B31.46 1,735 (1 fresh issue), #14459 C69 1,818 (C9.08 pending since Day105; paid at C69 around Day118, 1 fresh issue), #19085 B49 1,832 (usage 0, bills around Day122 for ~$89.8k). Do not reject churn-prevention threads; low pending offers may preserve logos/reputation if accepted.
 
 ## Segment/unit-economics notes
-- S2 remains cash engine but near cap: active S2 139,449 vs lvl1 cap estimate ~167k. Stored S2 MRR $13.799M/mo (A 76,727 / $5.182M; B 62,682 / $8.606M; C 40 / $11k). Week16 paid content: 2,848 paid leads on $350k (~0.0081 leads/$, daily 0.005-0.010); 2,280 paid S2 subs (~80% conv), plan mix ~44% A / 56% B, paid CAC ~$153/sub before lead cost; first-month cash slightly below CAC but LTV remains attractive. Network added 509 S2 subs. Keep content $50k/day unless lpd persistently <0.006 or B-tier quality shock appears.
-- S2 cancellations Week16: 1,927 A and 150 B (MRR lost ~$129.5k/mo). B churn was low before B tier downgrade; next week’s B renewals are the critical signal. If B cancellations/downgrades spike materially, restore B=3 and consider reducing ads temporarily.
-- Compute after Day112: before B downgrade S2 B used 73.3M units/wk costing $439.6k; tier2 should cut that to ~$146.5k/wk. S2 A tier1 cost only ~$26.6k/wk. Do not downgrade C; it anchors enterprise/premium quality.
-- Support/social: support is biggest reputation risk. Recent posts praised product quality but complained about radio silence and tickets nearly a week old. Open S2 issues: 489 >=2d, 362 >=7d, 255 >=14d; S1 11 tickets all old (~42d avg). Ops raised to clear backlog. Do not cut ops until stale-ticket counts fall sharply and social turns quiet.
-- Capacity: tier6 safe unless peak >65M/80M or a huge enterprise acceptance wave lands. B tier2 lowers compute cost but not usage/capacity units.
-
-## New/discovered groups
-- D_S07 Data Analysts lvl2: WTP ~$108, usage ~207/day, q_min ~0.422, cap ~71k, growth 17.1%; strong links to S2/S3. Active 271 (124 A, 147 B), MRR $27.7k. Week16 network conversion 150/855 (~17.5%) with day112 31.6%; B-heavy plan mix (137 B / 13 A), likely due quality/price curves. Keep no paid ads; recurring $20 + lead $40 + dev $3k/day. Watch B tier2 impact on D_S07 B conversion.
-- D_E02 Educational Institutions lvl2: WTP ~$69.6, usage ~93/day, q_min ~0.481, cap ~301 accounts, seats 63-760, avg response 9.2d. Huge network lead flow now; 153 open offers / 68.3k seats at B29/C49. Targeted dev $5k/day. No paid ads until offer responses prove unit economics.
-- D_E09 Real Estate lvl2: WTP ~$90, usage ~80/day, q_min ~0.425, cap ~89 accounts, seats 23-332, avg response 3.8d. 14 open offers / 3.2k seats at B29/C49. Prior paid test poor; no ads.
-- **D_S04 Small Agency Teams newly discovered lvl1**: WTP ~$116, usage ~216/day, q_min ~0.512, cap ~34.9k, growth 15.6%. Incoming referrals from S2 ~0.0005 per S2 sub/day (~70 leads/day at current scale) plus D_S07/S3. Baseline A quality was below q_min; Day112 added dev $5k/day plus t5 Day114 and recurring/lead promos ($20/$40) so A should become viable quickly. No paid ads until organic conversion is measured.
-- **D_E08 Energy Companies newly discovered lvl1**: WTP ~$164, usage ~139/day, q_min ~0.454, cap ~92 accounts, seats 52-735, avg response 11.1d, high reputation linkage with E3/E2/E1. Level2 research due Day115; dev $3k/day. No lead

FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status IN ('subscribed','active')
GROUP BY c.group_id,c.customer_type,s.plan,ROUND(s.effective_price,2),s.billing_day_mod30,s.start_day
""")['rows']
small=[]; ent=[]
for r in rows:
    rec={'group':r['group_id'],'plan':r['plan'],'price':float(r['price']),'mod':int(r['billing_day_mod30']),'age':DAY-int(r['start_day']),'n':float(r['n']),'seats':float(r['seats'] or r['n'])}
    (ent if r['customer_type']=='large' else small).append(rec)
# Open enterprise pipeline latest offers excluding active customers
pipe=nm.query("""
WITH last AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
mx AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats, MIN(day) first_day FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id),
act AS (SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM subscriptions WHERE status IN ('subscribed','active'))
SELECT t.customer_id,c.group_id,mx.seats,mx.first_day,t.day latest_day,t.offer_json,t.turn_number,t.sender
FROM last l JOIN enterprise_turns t ON t.message_id=l.mid
JOIN mx ON mx.customer_id=t.customer_id JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=t.customer_id
LEFT JOIN act ON act.customer_id=t.customer_id
WHERE t.closed=0 AND t.thread_type='new_lead' AND act.customer_id IS NULL
""")['rows']
def parse_offers(s):
    try:
        data=json.loads(s or '[]')
        if isinstance(data,list): return [(o.get('plan'),float(o.get('price_per_seat'))) for o in data]
    except Exception: pass
    return []
open_ents=[]
for r in pipe:
    offers=parse_offers(r['offer_json']); d={p:pr for p,pr in offers}; seats=float(r['seats'] or 0)
    if seats<5 or not offers: continue
    g=r['group_id']; age=DAY-int(r['first_day'])
    # mu = probability this open lead eventually closes in the modeled horizon, before delay filters.
    if g=='D_E02': mu=0.19; kind='D_E02_B29'
    elif g=='D_E09': mu=0.13; kind='D_E09_B29'
    elif g=='E1': mu=0.15; kind='E1_low'
    elif g=='D_E07': mu=0.12; kind='DE07_new'
    elif d.get('B') in (22.47,28.24): mu=0.42; kind='matched_low_counter'
    elif d.get('C')==69 and d.get('B')==49: mu=0.035; kind='C69B49_stale'
    elif d.get('B')==29.0 and d.get('C')==59.0: mu=0.090; kind='B29C59'
    elif d.get('C')==59: mu=0.075; kind='C59B45'
    elif d.get('C')==49 and d.get('B')==39: mu=0.110; kind='C49B39'
    elif d.get('B') in (31.46,33.38,27.67): mu=0.14; kind='B30ish'
    elif d.get('B')==29.0: mu=0.100; kind='B29C49'

    else: mu=0.070; kind='other'
    if age>70: mu*=0.45
    elif age>45: mu*=0.65
    open_ents.append({'group':g,'seats':seats,'first_day':int(r['first_day']),'latest_day':int(r['latest_day']),'offers':offers,'mu':mu,'kind':kind})

def pct(vals,p):
    vals=sorted(vals); return vals[int((len(vals)-1)*p)]

def choose_offer(e):
    d={p:pr for p,pr in e['offers']}
    if 'B' in d and 'C' in d:
        pc=0.22
        if d.get('C',999)<=49: pc=0.32
        if d.get('C',999)>=79: pc=0.20
        if e['group']=='D_E02': pc=0.20
        if e['group']=='E1': pc=0.22
        return ('C',d['C']) if random.random()<pc else ('B',d['B'])
    if 'B' in d: return 'B',d['B']
    if 'C' in d: return 'C',d['C']
    return 'B',29.0

def initial_ent_events(days):
    ev=[]
    for e in open_ents:
        age=DAY-e['first_day']
        p=max(0.001,min(0.65,random.gauss(e['mu'],e['mu']*0.45+0.025)))
        if random.random()<p:
            if e['kind']=='matched_low_counter': delay=max(1,int(random.gauss(8,5)))
            elif e['group'] in ('D_E02','D_E09'): delay=max(2,int(random.gauss(10,6)))
            elif age>55: delay=max(3,int(random.gauss(15,10)))
            elif age>20: delay=max(6,int(random.gauss(23,12)))
            else: delay=max(8,int(random.gauss(33,16)))
            day=DAY+delay
            if day<=DAY+days:
                plan,price=choose_offer(e)
                ev.append({'day':day,'seats':e['seats'],'plan':plan,'price':price,'mod':day%30,'group':e['group']})
    return ev

        if active_s2>0.92*cap: ad=35000.0
        if active_s2>0.965*cap: ad=15000.0
        paid=max(0,random.gauss(ad*paid_lpd*rel_sat, max(25,ad*paid_lpd*0.30)))
        net=max(0,random.gauss(active_s2*net_rate*rel_sat, max(18,active_s2*net_rate*0.33)))
        leads=paid+net
        # B3 restoration + high dev gradually recover conversion; random competitor days still hurt.
        cv=conv_base + min(0.075, rel*0.0045) + support_repair*min(1,rel/21)
        for bd,b in boosts:
            if d>=bd: cv+=min(0.055,b*0.13)
        cv-=macro_bad*min(1,rel/35)
        if random.random()<0.018: cv-=random.uniform(0.04,0.15)
        cv=max(0.52,min(0.92,random.gauss(cv,0.035)))
        new=leads*cv
        ma=max(0.30,min(0.62,random.gauss(mixA,0.04)))
        mb=max(0.34,min(0.66,random.gauss(mixB,0.04)))
        if ma+mb>0.995: mb=0.995-ma
        nA=new*ma; nB=new*mb; nC=max(0,new-nA-nB)
        cash += nA*small_first_cash('S2','A') + nB*small_first_cash('S2','B') + nC*small_first_cash('S2','C')
        cohorts.append({'n':nA,'seats':nA,'group':'S2','plan':'A','price':79.0,'mod':d%30,'age':0})
        cohorts.append({'n':nB,'seats':nB,'group':'S2','plan':'B','price':159.0,'mod':d%30,'age':0})
        if nC>0: cohorts.append({'n':nC,'seats':nC,'group':'S2','plan':'C','price':349.0,'mod':d%30,'age':0})
        # Organic lead segments unlocked by promos/dev; no paid ads.
        def add_small(group, lead_rate, cv_start, cv_gain, bshare_mu):
            nonlocal cash, cohorts
            leads_g=max(0, random.gauss(active_s2*lead_rate*rel_sat, max(5,active_s2*lead_rate*0.35)))
            cvg=max(0.0,min(0.65,random.gauss(cv_start + min(cv_gain, rel*cv_gain/21.0),0.08)))
            # t6/t8 global quality raises all boats
            for bd,b in boosts:
                if d>=bd: cvg=min(0.75,cvg+min(0.06,b*0.10))
            newg=leads_g*cvg
            if newg<=0: return leads_g
            bshare=max(0.02,min(0.95,random.gauss(bshare_mu,0.14)))
            # low-WTP non-profit mostly A; S3/D_S07 more B.
            nb=newg*bshare; na=newg-nb
            cash += na*small_first_cash(group,'A') + nb*small_first_cash(group,'B')
            if na>0: cohorts.append({'n':na,'seats':na,'group':group,'plan':'A','price':recurring_price(group,'A'),'mod':d%30,'age':0})
            if nb>0: cohorts.append({'n':nb,'seats':nb,'group':group,'plan':'B','price':recurring_price(group,'B'),'mod':d%30,'age':0})
            return leads_g
        leads_extra=0
        leads_extra += add_small('D_S07',0.00085,0.04,0.30,0.55)
        leads_extra += add_small('D_S04',0.00052,0.02,0.34,0.35)
        leads_extra += add_small('D_S03',0.00095,0.10,0.28,0.06)
        leads_extra += add_small('S3',0.00045,0.03,0.25,0.70)
        # New enterprise leads generated by network; most accept after delay beyond short horizon.
        lam=max(0,active_s2*0.00015*rel_sat)
        e3_new=max(0,int(random.gauss(lam,max(1,math.sqrt(max(1,lam))))))
        for _ in range(e3_new):
            seats=max(120,random.gauss(1000,520)); p=max(0.025,min(0.16,random.gauss(0.075,0.045)))
            if random.random()<p:
                delay=max(10,int(random.gauss(34,17))); ev_day=d+delay
                if ev_day<=DAY+days:
                    plan='C' if random.random()<0.25 else 'B'; price=59.0 if plan=='C' else 29.0
                    ent_events.append({'day':ev_day,'seats':seats,'plan':plan,'price':price,'mod':ev_day%30,'group':'E3'})
        for ev in list(ent_events):
            if ev['day']==d:
                cash += ev['seats']*ev['price']
                ents.append({'group':ev['group'],'seats':ev['seats'],'n':1,'plan':ev['plan'],'price':ev['price'],'mod':d%30,'age':0})
                ent_events.remove(ev)
        # Billing renewals + churn. Retention is monthly at billing.
        quality_bonus=0
        for bd,b in boosts:
            if d>=bd: quality_bonus += min(0.055,b*0.10)
        for c in cohorts:
            if c['age']>0 and c['mod']==d%30 and c['n']>0:
                if c['group']=='S2':
                    # Next 2-3 weeks are fragile; t6 and support/dev recover retention.
                    base=0.900 + min(0.055, rel*0.0018) + quality_bonus - macro_bad*0.6
                    if c['plan']=='B': base+=0.012  # B3 restoration
                    if c['plan']=='A': base-=0.006
                    if active_s2>0.90*cap: base-=0.012
                elif c['group']=='D_S03': base=0.86 + quality_bonus
                elif c['group'] in ('D_S07','D_S04','S3'): base=0.88 + quality_bonus
                else: base=0.84 + quality_bonus
                ret=max(0.72,min(0.992,random.gauss(base,0.030)))
                c['n']*=ret; c['seats']=c['n']; cash += c['n']*c['price']
            c['age']+=1
        for e in ents:
            if e['age']>0 and e['mod']==d%30 and e['seats']>0:
                eret=0.87 if e['price']<=49 else (0.80 if e['price']<=69 else 0.70)
                eret += quality_bonus*1.2 - macro_bad*0.35
                eret=max(0.40,min(0.985,random.gauss(eret,0.10)))
                if random.random()<eret:
                    # Some high-price accounts accept discount/churn prevention.
                    if e['price']>=69 and random.random()<0.24:
                        e['price']=random.choice([49.0,29.0,17.74,9.08]); e['plan']='B' if e['price']<49 else e['plan']
                    cash += e['seats']*e['price']
                else:
                    e['seats']=0
            e['age']+=1
        ents=[e for e in ents if e['seats']>0]
        # Costs: Week17 surge, then likely taper after backlog stabilizes and t6 lands.
        if rel<=14: ops=133000.0
        elif rel<=35: ops=110000.0
        else: ops=90000.0
        if rel<=21: dev=92000.0
        elif d<140: dev=75000.0
        elif rel<=84: dev=60000.0
        else: dev=52000.0
        capcost=28000.0
        cash -= (ad+ops+dev+capcost)
        cash -= (leads+leads_extra)*0.5
        # Compute for small subs.
        for c in cohorts:
            if c['n']<=0: continue
            per=plan_cost_per_day(c['group'],c['plan'])
            cash -= c['n']*per
        # Enterprise compute; varies heavily with usage.
        for e in ents:
            if e['group']=='D_E02': usage=max(25,random.lognormvariate(math.log(85),0.55))
            elif e['group'] in ('D_E07','D_E08'): usage=max(35,random.lognormvariate(math.log(130),0.60))
            else: usage=max(5,random.lognormvariate(math.log(55),0.85))
            cost_per=0.006 if e['plan']=='B' else 0.012
            cash -= e['seats']*usage*cost_per
        # Occasional support/competitor/outage shocks.
        if random.random()<0.012: cash -= random.uniform(50000,350000)
        # Future R&D likely to be started only with comfortable liquidity.
        for rd_day,cost,name,threshold in future_rd:
            if d==rd_day and name not in rd_done and cash>threshold:
                cash-=cost; rd_done.add(name)
    return cash, sum(c['n'] for c in cohorts if c['group']=='S2'), sum(c['n']*c['price'] for c in cohorts), sum(e['seats'] for e in ents)

for days in [7,28,84,182]:

q='''

), last AS (

)

import novamind_api as nm, json

outputs = {}

# Research investments: one mid-tier R&D project and better estimates for the segments we are now testing.
try:
    outputs['start_t8'] = nm.research.start_research_project(tier=8)
except Exception as e:
    outputs['start_t8_error'] = str(e)

for gid in ['S2', 'S3', 'D_E07', 'D_S03']:
    try:
        outputs[f'research_{gid}'] = nm.market.research_group(group_id=gid, target_level=2)
    except Exception as e:
        outputs[f'research_{gid}_error'] = str(e)

# Restore B quality after the tier-2 test produced a large downgrade/churn week.
outputs['prices'] = nm.pricing.set_prices(A=79, B=159, C=349)
outputs['tiers'] = nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=1, B=3, C=4)
outputs['quotas'] = nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=15000, B=500000, C=1000000)
outputs['capacity'] = nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6)

# Targeted promotions for organic discovered individual segments; keep S2 list revenue intact.
known = [g['group_id'] for g in nm.market.get_market_overview()['known_groups']]
promo = {g: 0.0 for g in known}
promo.update({
    'D_S07': 40.0,   # A=$39 / B=$119, helps recently stalled organic conversion
    'D_S04': 40.0,   # A=$39 / B=$119; A will become quality-viable after this dev week
    'D_S03': 55.0,   # A=$24 for low-WTP non-profit workers, still high margin on low usage
    'S3': 20.0       # B=$139 for power users while we test quality unlock
})
outputs['promotion'] = nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=promo)

lead_promo = {g: 0.0 for g in known}
lead_promo.update({
    'S2': 10.0,
    'D_S07': 40.0,
    'D_S04': 40.0,
    'D_S03': 20.0,
    'S3': 40.0
})
outputs['lead_promotion'] = nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_promo)

# Keep paid S2 acquisition; it remains CAC-positive despite macro/quality pressure.
outputs['ads_strength'] = nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={})
outputs['targeted_ads'] = nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={'content_marketing': {'S2': 50000.0}})

# Surge ops and dev for support/reputation and to counter competitor feature launches.
outputs['daily_spend'] = nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=8000.0, development=10000.0)
outputs['targeted_ops'] = nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={
    'S2': 75000.0,
    'E3': 30000.0,
    'S1': 8000.0,
    'S3': 2000.0,
    'D_S07': 2000.0,
    'D_S04': 2000.0,
    'D_S03': 1000.0,
    'D_E02': 2000.0,
    'D_E08': 1000.0,
    'D_E09': 1000.0,
    'D_E07': 1000.0,
})
outputs['targeted_dev'] = nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={
    'S2': 15000.0,
    'E3': 10000.0,
    'D_S07': 10000.0,
    'D_S04': 15000.0,
    'D_S03': 3000.0,
    'S3': 10000.0,
    'D_E02': 7000.0,
    'D_E08': 5000.0,
    'D_E09': 2000.0,
    'D_E07': 5000.0,
})

# Public support/SLA response.
post = "We heard the support feedback. This week we’re funding a 24h critical-response SLA, enterprise production triage, and more specialist coverage. RAG is live, Pro quality is being upgraded, and stale tickets are getting exec review."
outputs['social'] = nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=post)

# Reply to every latest non-agent enterprise lead.
rows = nm.query('''
WITH latest AS (
 SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
), last AS (
 SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN latest l ON et.customer_id=l.customer_id AND et.message_id=l.max_mid WHERE et.closed=0
), seats AS (
 SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) AS true_seats FROM enterprise_turns GROUP BY customer_id
)
SELECT last.customer_id, c.group_id, COALESCE(seats.true_seats,last.seat_count) seats, last.day, last.thread_type, last.turn_number, last.sender
FROM last JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN seats USING(customer_id)
WHERE last.sender <> 'agent'
ORDER BY last.day,last.customer_id
''')['rows']

deals=[]
for r in rows:
    cid = r['customer_id']; gid = r['group_id']
    if gid == 'E1':
        offers = [['B', 19.0], ['C', 39.0]]
    elif gid in ('D_E02', 'D_E09'):
        offers = [['B', 29.0], ['C', 49.0]]
    elif gid == 'D_E07':
        offers = [['B', 49.0], ['C', 89.0]]
    elif gid == 'D_E08':
        offers = [['B', 39.0], ['C', 79.0]]
    else:  # E3 and any other strategic enterprise leads
        offers = [['B', 29.0], ['C', 59.0]]
    deals.append([cid, offers])
outputs['enterprise_to_send'] = {'count': len(deals), 'seats': sum((r.get('seats') or 0) for r in rows)}
if deals:
    outputs['enterprise_send'] = nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=deals)

# Verify no latest non-agent open enterprise turns remain.
outputs['latest_non_agent_after'] = nm.query('''
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN latest l ON et.customer_id=l.customer_id AND et.message_id=l.max_mid WHERE et.closed=0 AND et.sender <> 'agent'
''')['rows']
outputs['cash_after_actions'] = nm.query("SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) AS cash FROM ledger")['rows']
outputs['research_table'] = nm.query("SELECT * FROM research_projects ORDER BY project_id")['rows']

print(json.dumps(outputs, indent=2))
